calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Q-012 control constraint necessity (REE_FULL vs PREDICTIVE_ONLY)
items.notes: EXP-0062. Q-012 replication at 2x EXQ-152 scale. REE_FULL vs PREDICTIVE_ONLY vs NO_LEARNING. 3 seeds x 3 conditions x 300 episodes x 300 steps.

items.title: Minimal Vertebrate Cognition Ablation -- E1+E2+hippocampus core loop
items.notes: Milestone architecture validation. Strips commitment architecture (commitment_threshold=-1.0, z_goal_enabled=False, benefit_eval_enabled=False). Tests whether core E1/E2/hippocampus loop gradient-follows on raw env signals. Sidesteps SD-011/SD-012 blockers. PASS criteria: C1 reward > random, C2 harm < random, C4 learning within warmup (all >= 2/3 seeds).

items.title: SD-003 Full Latent Counterfactual Attribution on z_harm_s (post-SD-011)
items.notes: Full latent z_harm_s counterfactual pipeline. Uses ResidualHarmForward (now in ree_core) to avoid identity collapse. Transposition of EXQ-030b (z_world) to z_harm_s. EXQ-166e validated scalar proxy; this validates the full latent version.

items.title: MECH-033 E2 kernel chain pair (chain vs no-chain, 3-seed replication)
items.note: MECH-033 3-seed replication (extends EXQ-171 2-seed). KERNEL_CHAIN vs NO_CHAIN greedy avoidance. 600 warmup + 50 eval eps per seed.

items.title: ARC-018 rollout viability pair (viability_mapped vs viability_ablated)
items.note: ARC-018 discriminative pair: VIABILITY_MAPPED (ResidueField + HippocampalModule CEM terrain) vs VIABILITY_ABLATED (residue field zeroed). Real ree_core modules. Fixes EXQ-172 inline-module issue. 3 seeds.

items.title: MECH-116 / ARC-032 theta-bypass ablation (theta_buffer zeroed vs enabled)
items.notes: THETA_BYPASS_ENABLED vs THETA_BYPASS_DISABLED (theta_buffer zeroed after each update). E1 goal-conditioned in both. Measures E1 prediction error in goal-zone vs neutral-zone. PASS: goal-relevant error increases when theta disabled (margin>0.02, interaction>0.01) in >= 2/3 seeds. evidence_direction_per_claim required.

items.title: MECH-128 E1 goal-conditioning pair (GOAL_CONDITIONED vs GOAL_ABLATED)
items.notes: GOAL_CONDITIONED (e1.goal_dim=32) vs GOAL_ABLATED (e1.goal_dim=0). drive_weight=2.0. 3 seeds x 400 warmup + 100 eval x 200 steps. PASS: interaction>=0.005 in >=2/3 seeds, goal-relevant E1 error lower in GOAL_CONDITIONED, neutral error similar. C4 (z_goal_norm > 0.05) required in all seeds.

items.title: MECH-075 Novelty Loop Diagnostic (GATED vs ABLATED)
items.notes: Diagnostic after EXQ-192a FAIL + EXQ-209 weakens. Probes whether novelty signal (E1 world-prediction MSE EMA) is active and whether CEM noise scaling produces >= 10% exploration gap. PASS: novelty_mag > 0.01 AND explore_gap >= 0.10 in >= 2/3 seeds. EXPERIMENT_PURPOSE=diagnostic. 3 seeds x 150 train + 50 eval x 200 steps.

items.title: MECH-106 BG Hysteresis First Experiment (PERSISTENT vs REACTIVE)
items.notes: First experiment for MECH-106. PERSISTENT (min_hold=20 steps + margin release) vs REACTIVE (instantaneous variance-threshold). PASS: persistence_ratio_PERSISTENT > 2.0 AND reactive_ratio <= 1.5 in >= 2/3 seeds. 3 seeds x 400 eps x 200 steps.

items.title: ARC-026 Approach/Contact Slope Conflict Resolution (peak-checkpoint analysis)
items.notes: Resolves EXQ-033 conflict_ratio=1.0. Uses peak-checkpoint analysis (not terminal) to handle training instability. 1500 eps, checkpoints at [200,400,600,800,1000,1500]. PASS: approach_slope > contact_slope at peak in >= 2/3 seeds, approach_gap > 0.05 at peak. Phased E3 supervision from ep100.

items.title: SD-012 z_goal Seeding Causal Validation (drive_weight=2.0 vs 0.0)
items.notes: Validates drive_weight as causal variable for z_goal seeding. SD012_ACTIVE (drive_weight=2.0) vs SD012_ABLATED (drive_weight=0.0). PASS: goal_norm_active > 0.1 in all seeds (C1), goal_norm_ablated < 0.05 in all seeds (C2), benefit_goal_corr > 0.2 in >= 2/3 seeds (C3). evidence_direction_per_claim for SD-012 and MECH-112.

items.title: MECH-117 Wanting/Liking Dissociation Replication (seeds [1,2,3])
items.notes: Independent replication of EXQ-074f (seeds [42,7,13]) with seeds [1,2,3]. Same design: 3000 steps, 6x6 grid, L1->L2 relocation at step 1500. Wanting chases L1 (incentive salience); liking redirects to L2. PASS: 4/4 criteria in >= 2/3 seeds. Supports MECH-117 stable promotion. evidence_direction_per_claim for MECH-112 and MECH-117.

items.title: ARC-029 committed-mode harm redesign (8 hazards, 5 seeds, majority rule)
items.notes: Redesign to fix low statistical power under SD-010/011/012 substrate. num_hazards 4->8, hazard_harm 0.02->0.05, proximity_harm_scale 0.05->0.15. Seeds [0,42,100,123,200] with majority rule C1/C2/C3>=4/5 seeds. MIN_HARM_GAP_STABLE raised 0.0001->0.001. harm_obs passed to sense() (SD-010 nociceptive stream active). EXQ-125 failed 3x: harm rates ~100x smaller than EXQ-063 due to substrate, making committed-gate advantage undetectable.
